summary.zh: 用低幅度呼吸或漂浮提示元素仍处于可用、等待或活跃状态。
summary.en: Use subtle breathing or floating motion for available, waiting, or active states.

definition.zh: 元素静置并等待交互时播放的细微运动。
definition.en: Low-intensity ambient motion gives a waiting element activity without requiring input.

description.zh: 控制完整循环的节奏；持续动态需要支持暂停并保持低干扰。
description.en: Controls the rhythm of one full cycle; continuous motion should stay pausable and low-distraction.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

purpose.zh: 通过低幅度漂浮或脉冲提示元素处于可用、等待或活跃状态。
purpose.en: Use low-amplitude float or pulse motion to indicate availability, waiting, or activity.

frequency.zh: 只在长时间静置时低频出现，用户开始操作后立即停止。
frequency.en: Appear only after a meaningful idle period and stop immediately when the user interacts.

trigger.zh: 由空闲计时器或持续状态触发，页面隐藏和元素离屏时暂停。
trigger.en: Trigger from an idle timer or ongoing state, pausing when hidden or offscreen.

enterExit.zh: 从稳定状态渐入低幅度循环，退出时在最近的中性帧停止。
enterExit.en: Ease into a low-amplitude loop and stop on the nearest neutral frame.

interruptibility.zh: 输入到来时取消循环并平滑回到稳定值，避免与交互反馈叠加。
interruptibility.en: Cancel on input and settle to a stable value without overlapping interaction feedback.

gestureRules.zh: 空闲动效不承担操作；真实控件仍提供明确点击、触摸和键盘反馈。
gestureRules.en: Idle motion carries no action; real controls keep explicit click, touch, and keyboard feedback.

reducedMotion.zh: 关闭自动漂浮和脉冲，使用静态状态标记。
reducedMotion.en: Disable automatic float and pulse motion and use a static status indicator.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认动效只在真正空闲后开始。
reviewNotes.en: Start only after the interface is genuinely idle.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制振幅和对比，避免持续吸引注意。
reviewNotes.en: Limit amplitude and contrast to avoid persistent attention capture.
